name: Diabetic Sour Cream Spice Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 13 x 9 baking pan.
3. Cream together the margarine and sugar replacement in a bowl until smooth.
4. Add eggs and beat well. Beat in the cinnamon, cloves, and nutmeg.
5. Sift together the flour, baking soda, powder, and salt into another bowl.
6. Mix the dry ingredients into the creamed mixture alternately with the water, stirring until just combined.
7. Stir in the sour cream, raisins, and walnuts.
8. Pour batter into prepared pan.
9. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Let cool completely before serving.
Recipe yields 18 servings at approximately 124 calories per serving. Exchanges: 1 1/2 bread, 1 fat
